name: Philosophy Dark
description: Dark, moody visuals for philosophy/commentary videos
art_style: Cinematic digital art, photorealistic rendering with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, reminiscent of Caravaggio meets modern concept art.
color_palette: Deep blacks, warm amber highlights, muted earth tones, occasional cold blue accents for contrast.
quality_tags: Ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, professional photography composition, award-winning digital art, masterful lighting.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, childish, bright neon colors, cluttered composition, text overlays, watermarks, blurry, low quality, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, generic stock photo look.
